home.title: Shaka Inzu y’Inzozi zawe
home.subtitle: Reba amazu meza yo gukodesha mu buryo bworoshye

hero.subtitle: Urubuga rwose hamwe rugufasha kwishyura mu mutekano, gukoresha amasezerano ya digitale no kubaka amanota y’icyizere cy’umukodesha. Turimo kubaka uburyo bw’ubukode buboneye mu Rwanda.
hero.joinUsers: Injira mu bantu barenga 2,000 bishimiye gukoresha urubuga rwacu

featuresSection.verifiedDesc: Buri nzu igenzurwa n’ikipe yacu kugira ngo tumenye ko ifite umutekano kandi yujuje ubuziranenge.
featuresSection.trustDesc: Kubaka izina ryiza hashingiwe ku kwishyura ku gihe no ku mateka y’amasezerano ya digitale kugira ngo ubashe kubona amazu arushijeho kuba meza.
featuresSection.payDesc: Ishyura ubukode bwawe ukoresheje MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money cyangwa banki ukunda.

howItWorks.title: Uko Bikora
howItWorks.subtitle: Kurikiza izi ntambwe zoroshye kugira ngo ubone inzu yawe itaha mu Rwanda.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Fungura konti yawe mu mutekano hanyuma winjire kugira ngo ubone serivisi zose z’urubuga.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Reba amazu yagenzuwe maze uhitemo inzu ijyanye n’ubuzima bwawe.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Rangiza ubwishyu bwawe ukoresheje MTN, Airtel cyangwa banki zihuza n’urubuga rwacu.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Rangiza kwimuka ushyira umukono ku masezerano y’ubukode kuri platform.

adminFeatures.title: Cunga ubukode bwawe nk’umunyamwuga
adminFeatures.subtitle: Dashboard yacu iguha ibikoresho byose bya kinyamwuga ukeneye kugira ngo uvugane n’abakodesha, ugenzure amakuru kandi ushyigikire ibikorwa byawe by’ubukode mu buryo bumwe.
adminFeatures.messagingDesc: Ganira ako kanya hagati ya nyir’inzu n’umukodesha, harimo gusangiza dosiye no kubika amateka y’ibiganiro mu mutekano.
adminFeatures.videoDesc: Kora visitas z’inzu n’ibiganiro n’abakodesha uri kure hifashishijwe uburyo bw’amashusho bufite ubwiza buhanitse.
adminFeatures.scheduleDesc: Sisitemu itegura mu buryo bwikora gahunda yo gusura amazu no gukora inama, kandi igahuzwa na kalendari yawe ya digitale.
adminFeatures.supportDesc: Ubuvuzi bw’ikoranabuhanga n’ubuhuza mu makimbirane biboneka amasaha yose kugira ngo ubukode bugende neza.

adminAnalytics.title: Dashboard yawe, Amakuru yawe, Iterambere ryawe
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Kurikirana imikorere y’amazu yawe, imyitwarire y’abakodesha n’imigendekere y’imari ukoresheje sisitemu yacu y’isesengura.

newsSection.title: Amakuru Mashya n’Ibitekerezo
newsSection.article1Desc: Reba uko ikoranabuhanga n’igenzura rya digitale biri guhindura uburyo bw’ubukode i Kigali.
newsSection.article2Title: Uko Wongera Amanota y’Icyizere cyawe nk’Umukodesha
newsSection.article2Desc: Ubuyobozi ku buryo kwishyura buri gihe hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa digitale bigufasha kubona amahitamo meza y’imiturire.
newsSection.article3Desc: Ihuriro rishya ryacu rituma gukusanya ubukode birushaho koroha ku ba nyir’amazu b’umwuga.
newsSection.article4Desc: Iby’ingenzi bikubiye mu mabwiriza ajyanye na serivisi zimwe z’imiturire.
newsSection.article5Title: Gahunda zo Kubaho mu Mutekano i Kigali
newsSection.article5Desc: Reba uko ubufatanye mu kurinda umutekano mu baturanyi buri kuzamura amanota y’umutekano ku bakodesha.
newsSection.article6Desc: Ibicuruzwa bishya by’imari bigenewe gufasha abakodesha bemejwe kwimuka vuba.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.subtitle: Ibyo ugomba kumenya byose ku rubuga rw’ubukode ruteye imbere mu Rwanda.
faq.q1: Ni gute amanota yanjye y’icyizere mu bukode abarwa?
faq.a1: Amanota y’icyizere abarwa hakoreshejwe uburyo bwihariye bushingiye ku bintu bine by’ingenzi: kwemeza umwirondoro, amateka yo kwishyura ubukode ku gihe, isuzuma ritangwa na ba nyir’amazu mwabanye, n’uko wubahiriza amasezerano ya digitale.
faq.q2: Ese amakuru yanjye bwite n’ubwishyu bwanjye biratekanye?
faq.a2: Umutekano ni wo dushyira imbere. Ubwishyu bwose bunyuzwa mu miyoboro ifite ubwirinzi buhanitse kandi twubahiriza uburyo bwizewe bwo kurinda amakuru yawe.
faq.q3: Ni gute igenzura ry’inzu rikorwa mbere yo kuyishyira ku rubuga?
faq.a3: Ikipe yacu isura inzu ku giti cyayo, ikagenzura imiterere yayo, ikemeza nyirayo n’ibisobanuro byayo mbere y’uko ishyirwa ku rubuga nk’inzu yemejwe.
faq.q4: Amasezerano ya digitale akora ate kuri uru rubuga?
faq.a4: Iyo wowe na nyir’inzu mwumvikanye, dukora amasezerano ya digitale. Mwayasoma, mukagira ibyo muhindura, mukayasinyira kuri platform kandi akabikwa neza muri konti yanyu.
faq.q5: Bigenda bite habaye amakimbirane hagati yanjye na nyir’inzu?
faq.a5: Urubuga rufite uburyo bwo gukemura amakimbirane. Ushobora gutanga ikibazo cyawe, maze ikipe yacu ikareba ubutumwa, amasezerano n’amakuru ajyanye na cyo kugira ngo ifashe mu buryo buboneye.
faq.supportText: Turahari kugira ngo tugufashe amasaha 24 kuri 24. Twandikire niba hari icyo ukeneye.

cta.title: Witeguye kunoza uburyo bwawe bwo gukodesha?
cta.subtitle: Injira mu bihumbi by’abakodesha na ba nyir’amazu mu Rwanda bari gukoresha uburyo bwizewe, bwihuse kandi buboneye bwo gukodesha.
